items.title: Form Analytics
items.description: Follow the below steps to view Form analytics.

items.title: Forms
items.description: Custom data-collection forms with manager approval workflows.

items.title: How can I submit a Form from Chat
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to make a form submission via chat if the form is added to the chat group in which you are part.

items.title: How can I submit a Form from Left Menu
items.description: You can Follow the below steps to submit a form in SmartWinnr from Left Menu.

items.title: How managers Approve  Form
items.description: Follow the below steps to approve a form in SmartWinnr.

items.title: How to add Approvers to a Form
items.description: An Editor who has access to the form can add approver to the form.

items.title: How to add new form submission
items.description: Only the user with the EDITOR role can add new form submission.

items.title: How to Approve/Reject a Form Submission
items.description: When your form has an approver added to it, users will get points for their submission only once the approver approves the form.

items.title: How to Create a form?
items.description: To create a form in SmartWinnr, go to Editor >>PERFORMANCE >> Forms >> View All Forms.

items.title: How to Edit a Form on submitted by a user?
items.description: An Editor who has access to the form can edit the submission made by a user

items.title: How to edit the form submission from manager's view
items.description: SmartWinnr allows the managers to edit the form submitted by their reporters.

items.title: How to Submit a Form on behalf of a User
items.description: An Editor who has access to the form can edit the submission made by a user
